creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2011-10-30 16:42:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/files pkg-deinstall.in 
                                        pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  This ZenPack adds a portlet called "Show Graph" which enables users to show any
  graph/multi graph reports on their dashboard. Several columns (as defined in
  report options) are supported.
  
  More details can be found at the provided url.
  
  WWW: http://community.zenoss.org/docs/DOC-3421
  
  PR:             ports/157190
  Submitted by:   Zenoss <zenoss@experts-exchange.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.268     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/files/pkg-deinstall.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net-mgmt/zenpack-graphportlet/pkg-plist (new)
